raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad kahpu es augfcham
gare to Uppi Nafti/un pahrluh-
koju to Muhri/un atgreeſohs/un
eegahju zaur Eelejas-Wahrtim/
ta greeſohs et atpakkat."
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Waldneeki ne fin-
naja/ kurp es biju nogahjis/ un
ko es darriju/ jo es wehl ne biju
teem Judeem/neds Preestereem/
neds Zeenigeem/neds Waldnee-
keem/neds teem zitteem/kas to
Darbu darrija/ lihds fchimi ne ko
punamn darrijs."
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazziju es us teem:
Juhs redsat to Relaimi / eekſch
ka mehs effam/ ka Jerufaleme
pohſta irr/ un winnas Wahrtis
ar Ugguni tadedſinataſ/ neh-
zeet/ uhſtaififim mehs Jerufale-
mes Muhens/ ka mehs par Ap-
fineekli wairs ne effam."
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es stahstiju teem to
Rohku manna Deewa/ kas bija
labba pahr mannt btijusi/ ka arri
ta Rehnika Wahrdus/ ko wiꞥſch
uhs manni fazztis bija.
Tad
fazzija tee: Zelfimees/ ka mehs
uhſtaifam/ un tee ſtiprinaja fa-
was Rohkas us labbu."
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Saneballats tas
daja Meremots/ Urijafa Dehle
tas Ammoniteris/ un Geseins
tas Araberis to dsirdeja/ tad ap-
tuchje tee muhs/ un nizzinaja
muhs/ un fazzija: Kas tas tahds
es/ ko juhs darrat? gribbat
t to Rehuizu turretees?kötteri/"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeju es teem/
fazziju uhs teem : Tas Dee
Debbeſis like mumis to labbi
dohtees/ un mehs winna Ra
zelfimees/ un uhſtaififim ( co
vet jums ne irr ne kahda Da-
neds Taifniba / nedg Peemin
fchana Jerufaleme."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
To paſchu Wahrdi/ kas Jerufalemes Muſ
atkai no jauna uſtaififichi / ar weenu
rakſifchann/ ka tahs Wahrtis un Muhr-
kat uſzelti ktunfchi : i / etc."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N Elijasibs tas Augſt
Preesteris zehlahs ar
weem Brahteen tee
Preestereem / un tas uſtaif-
tahs Awjn-Wahrtis/tee eeſwe
tija tahs/ un eezeble winnu Du
wis/ tee eeſwehtija tahs lih-
tam Turram Mea / lihds ta
Turram Ananeel."
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fahnis winnu strahd
ja tee Wihri no Jerikus/ un ta
nis winnu strahdaja Sakure
tas Dehls Juri."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahs Siwju-Wahrt
taifija tee Behrni Senaa / t
apfedſeto/ un eezeble winnu Du
wis / winnu Atſlehgas /
Breekſchſchatjanws."
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fahnis winneem stra-
daja Meremots/ Urijafa Dehle
ta Dehla Akoza. Un fahnis wi-
neem strahdaja Mesullams/ B-
rekiafa Dehls/ ta Dehla Mes-
beeka. Un fahnis winneem stra-
daja Zadaks/ Baena Dehls."
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fahnis winneem tee T-
bet winao Augſtneek-
ue pa"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
